treatment_information.specific_treatment: Coronary artery bypass graft x 2, Total arterial revascularization
treatment_information.dosage_or_details: Skeletonized left internal mammary artery graft to left anterior descending artery; Left radial artery graft to second diagonal artery; Endoscopic harvesting of the left radial artery
treatment_information.treatment_response: Patient is atrially paced, on phenylephrine infusion. Preserved biventricular function. Mitral regurgitation is now mild.

treatment_timeline.event: Patient underwent coronary angiography showing 100% proximal LAD stenosis.
CABG performed with coronary artery bypass grafts.
On transfer to the floor, patient endorses above story and is chest pain free.

patient_outcome.final_status: Alert and oriented x3, non-focal, ambulating, gait steady.
patient_outcome.quality_of_life: Sternal incision healing well, no erythema or drainage.
patient_outcome.patient_perspective: Patient expressed no concerns and appeared satisfied with postoperative condition.
